# z47 tracked source ownership manifest
#
# Entries are repo-root paths. Keep every tracked top-level path classified in
# exactly one of the first two sections.

[z47-owned]
.github
.gitignore
CONTRIBUTING.md
ZIG-README.md
build.zig
zig_bridge
zig_build
zig_docs
zig_src

[imported-upstream]
.gitattributes
.gitlab-ci.yml
.gitmodules
.readthedocs.yaml
BUILD.md
COPYING
LIBRARY
Makefile
PROGRAMS
README.md
dep
dist
distS
docs
meson.build
meson_options.txt
res
src
subprojects
tag2ver.py
tools

[approved-z47-additions-under-imported]
# Keep this section empty unless a reviewed exception is required.
